stem: Do you have something to ____ me?
I hardly ____ take a taxi.
My ____ are reading, watching movies, and collecting stamps.
My dog gets ____ when he hears the doorbell ring.

I ____ made many friends since I've moved.

You need to walk ____ the train station in order to reach the electronics store.
After I finish work, I will be going home, ____ dinner, and then going to sleep.
Is she the ____ one who knows how to use the copier?
The second assignment, ____ I will give you tomorrow, is easier than this one.
If your back is hurting, I suggest you see a ____.
Megan and Mandy are ____ twins; they look exactly the same.
I've come to the ____ that I need to practice more often.
Have you ____ any good movies lately?
The weather has been very nice ____.
Sally hasn't worked here ____ three years.
____ the price is reasonable, it's still too expensive for me.
When Kenny received the ____, his coworkers threw him a party.
I rarely finish all the food I'm given, so I should ask for smaller ____.
If you ____ to the store, will you get me a bottle of water?
No sooner had he left the room ____ the phone rang.
It's important to get ____ with your coworkers.
Tonya went on a diet so that she could lose some ____.
____ for Henry, everyone finished their homework last night.
They were very ____ with the inspection and found all of the problems.
All ____ guests must sign in at the front desk.
Can you ____ me up at 6:00?
Carrie finds ____ the questions (is) quite difficult.
Could I ____ your phone for a moment?
It's ____ for me to study when there is too much noise.
Would you ____ go home now or stay here longer?
____ your hand if you know the answer.
I don't know ____ he is telling the truth or not.
The person _____ lives across the hall is very noisy.
Brian swims very ____, so he often wins swimming competitions.
There are too many different colors being used, which makes the report look ____.
As I was watching TV, the phone rang and ____ me.
Cindy ____ had four days to work on this report already.
She has beautiful, ____ hair.
I haven't had a ____ in two years!
Many people think it's more ____ to take a plane than a train.
Skydiving is a very ____ sport.
I haven't ____ him in a while.
If I ____ you, I would go back to school.
Denise is not very good at ____ secrets.
Irene had a(n) ____ for breakfast.
Randy had never used ____ before he went to Asia.
The answer is ____ that one.
There are too ____ people on the boat.
All of the cars are ____ behind the building.
I need to ____ my computer in order to be able to use certain programs.
You need to ____ the road to get to the bank.
We need someone to ____ the meeting on Thursday.
____ you like to come to my house?
John gave me a nice ____.
If you feel tired, take a ____.
We are going to ____ at three o'clock.
Greg ____ two tickets to a concert in the mail.
I will be there ____ 15 minutes.
Have you ____ of that restaurant?
I think it's a ____ to not tell him the truth.
We need to finish this by Monday; ____, everyone must work over the weekend.
I was ____ to bring two guests to the party at my office.
When the timer goes ____, take the food out of the oven.
How do you ____ that in English?
My computer is unable to ____ to the Internet.
I like action movies because they're ____.
Can you ____ what you just said? I couldn't hear you.
If I ____ the competition, I will be upset.
I prefer sitting next to the ____ so that I can have more leg room.
Ray got new ____ because he was having trouble seeing.
The ____ weren't good enough, so we got lost.
It's always a good idea to trust your first ____ when answering a question on a test.
Yolanda never told anyone that she was in ____.
I've never ____ a horse before.
It's easiest to get there ____ bus.
A committee was in charge of ____ where the company picnic would take place.
To make a good impression at an interview, it's important to be ____.
My company is looking for a new ____ to work with.
All dentists recommend flossing as a way to ____ gum disease.
The detective ____ that Joseph had committed the crime.
Maintaining morale is ____ for employee satisfaction.
Do you know when the meeting will ____?
William ____ me to the event.
If the product is defective, you can ask for a(n) ____.
Kindergarten teachers always speak ____ to their students.
There are more than ____ muffins for everyone to have two.
After much ____, Penny was given the promotion.
These documents need to be ____ by the head office.
We need to ____ these books by subject.
This food tastes ____ than I thought it would.
I'm very ____. I try to stay away from unlucky things.
Can you ____ a good place for camping?
It might seem expensive at first, but the price is actually ____.
Tracy loses her ____ often.
Only five applicants have been ____ for interviews.
Henry and Yvonne are not very ____; they never agree on anything.
Our department was ____ 15 minutes to prepare for the meeting.
I had to ____ the bicycle I bought.
The procedure is so ____ that I can't figure out what to do.
____ he usually loves dessert, he didn't eat any tonight.
This knife is too ____ to cut anything.
Mitch was not ____ for the position, so he wasn't hired.
Which building is the tallest ____ the world?
He is too lazy to go to ____ a difficult school.
I just ____ someone say my name.
Maggie was late because she needed to ____ her daughter to the hospital.
He ____ likes meeting with his friends on the weekend.
You should consult a(n) ____ about this problem.
My company is looking for a person ____ with creating spreadsheets.
Many high school students worry about their ____.
The employees hoped that the meeting would be more ____ than the last one.
Judy became a teacher because she was ____ to helping children.
Dr. Phillips was ____ to speak at the prestigious university.
No ____ knowledge of registration software is needed for this job.
Did you ____ who was missing from class today?
I would prefer to sit ____ to my sister at dinner.
I can't go out this weekend because I have too many ____ to do.
I was ____ by the number of skyscrapers in Hong Kong.
____ care is very expensive in some places.
There's no way that this will fit in the closet; it's too ____!
My father ____ me to drive when I was 18.
The new product was ____ across the country in December.
If the hotel has no ____, you won't be able to stay there.
It's very ____ to make mistakes when learning something new.
When you are finished using the computer, make sure to ____ it down.
Although we've worked in the same office for two years, I've never ____ to him.
I bought a ____ computer.
My shirt is ____, so I need to wear a different one.
It's ____ midnight.
I'm going to ____ a salad for dinner.
When waiting for a train, please line up ____ the yellow line.
My dance club has over fifty ____.
My dog always gets ____ by thunderstorms.
I've never tried that before, and ____ has my friend.
I received an important e-mail from my boss two days ____.
I'm sorry, but I think you have ____ me for someone else.
The ____ felt much better after the surgery.
Kenny is looking for a ____ tutor to help him with his Spanish.
If you want to swim far, you must be able to hold your ____ for a long time.
If I knew ____ he was, I would tell you his name.
I can't eat peanuts because I am ____ to them.
____ all my friends, Sarah is the one I can really count on in a crisis.
I think you ____ get the job if you went to the interview.
I've lost a lot of ____ since starting my diet.
I need to figure out the ____ to this question before I go to class.
It's ____ whether or not he will win the nomination.
When I was a teenager, I was very _____. But now, it’s easier for me to talk to people.
Lena doesn’t want to go _____ with John because she is afraid of water.
Cindy enjoys _____ her dad read stories to her before bed.
Dad is busy cooking in the kitchen. Dinner will be _____ in ten minutes.
There are so many new _____ in the office. It’ll take me some time to remember who is who.

I feel like a _____. I was looking for my keys for hours but they have been in my pocket the
whole time.

Mr. and Mrs. Wu have three daughters. Two are in high school, and _____ is in elementary
school.
It is hard for trees to _____ along this beach because of the strong winds from the sea.
Christmas _____ and I want to visit my aunt abroad. Do you have any plans yet?
Jo won’t be happy if you’re late for his party tonight, so _____ sure that you arrive on time.

You may have a long drive because of the terrible _____. There are usually a lot of cars and
buses during this time.

In the future, there will _____ be greater basketball players than Stephen Curry, but now we
believe he is the best!

I guess the rainwater has come in from the kitchen. See? _____ of the windows are closed
except the one in the kitchen.

_____machines have been used to pick fruits for a long time, they were not used on
strawberry farms until several years ago.

There are online videos that teach you exercises you can do at home. They’ll _____ you a trip
to the gym, and some money too.

Jane’s parents are always happy to see their grandchildren, but mine _____ less so when I
visit them with my kids.
Before she _____ about it, you should tell Daphne you broke her favorite cup.

It was very windy this morning. Some of the shirts on the balcony were blown away _____ in
the pond.
My _____ hurts so much that I cannot even turn my head.
Our school basketball team won the national game last night. We are so _____ them.
Tomorrow is Sam’s last day in the office. Nobody knows why he decided to _____.

It’s not a good idea to go mountain climbing in this bad _____. We should wait until the
typhoon goes away.
Chris loves walking with Anna on snowy days, but Anna hates _____ very much.
Lora likes to eat bananas that are already a little brown on the outside, and so _____ I.

Your refrigerator shouldn’t be making loud noises now, but if it _____ does, just give me a
call and I’ll come check it again.

After winning money in the card game, Jay decided to try again. He felt that he might also be
_____ a second time.
The knife doesn’t cut very well. It’s not as _____ as before.
John will stay with his sister until he _____ an apartment.
Students _____ to go on the school trip should ask their parents first.
The temple sits alone in the mountains at a height of 3,000m _____ sea level.

Patty spent several days planning to invite Charlie to dinner, _____ she couldn’t say a word
when they met.

I can’t tell you what I think of the movie because I _____ it. I’ll probably watch it this
Saturday.

The new guy at the help desk answers calls like a _____. There are no ups and downs in his
voice and you can’t tell if he is happy or sad.

Jasmine planned to spend her summer in the country, but right after she got there, she started
to _____ the noise in the city.

“Bad traffic” is perhaps the _____ excuse for being late when your boss knows it only takes
you five minutes to walk to work.

The housework in Mr. and Mrs. Wang’s family _____ between them and their kids.
Everyone’s got their own job to do.
I want to find another dentist because _____ pulled out a good tooth last time I went to him.

Mom: Linda, you’ve been playing computer games all evening! Have you finished your
report?
Linda: Well, _____ most of it this afternoon, and I’ll finish it by Friday.
Dennis enjoys _____ in public. He is proud of his beautiful voice.
Mrs. Johnson can’t hear very well. If you need to talk to her, you must _____.
People got very excited when they watched Ms. Smith _____ at the party.

I tried on these shoes in several different _____, and I thought the white pair looked best on
me.
Rex did not feel the earthquake this morning. He _____ in the park at the time.
Mr. Lee has worked in the same store for ten years; he’s never thought about _____ his job.

I didn’t take the bus today because it was ______. All the seats were taken and a lot of
students were standing.
Don’t go away when you’re cooking, _____ the food might burn.

Jerry wanted to know _____ he was kicked off the soccer team, but no one gave him a good
reason.

Jenny is already forty, doesn’t have a job and often makes trouble for her parents. To them,
she is really a(n) _____ .
Ed and Jill _____ camping this weekend, so they have to finish their homework by Friday.
Doraemon, a blue Japanese robot cat, has hated mice since his ears by a mouse.
If we play some interesting games in class, there _____ more fun in learning English.

The _____ of this shop was so bad; I never got any answer after I emailed them my
questions.

It’s not easy to see those islands clearly from here on sunny days, and it’s even less _____ to
see them on cloudy days.

Do you remember the CD I was looking for for months? I _____ found it in a small shop.
Look, here it is!

Business at Jane’s shop has not been good these days. And the new supermarket across the
street only makes things _____.
Scott wasn’t sure if the young woman before him was pulled him out of a car on fire.

I _____ swimming for several years before I went to this high school. I gave it up because of
heavy schoolwork.
Frank Kane is so good in the movie that many people _____ he will win the best actor prize.
The new medicine that just came out on the market _____ thousands of lives.

Now I often think of those days with Pip, my pet dog. When I read in my room, he _____
quietly beside me.
The movie starts at two o’clock, _____ let’s meet at the theater at one forty-five.
Peter is afraid of the dark. He even leaves the _____ on when sleeping.
Pam is a _____ baseball player; she has more fans than any other player on her team.
I did not do my homework, so my teacher said I _____ stay after school to finish it.

Kevin has only enough money for the bag or the shoes. That is a hard ____ to make because
he likes them both.

It was _____ for us to answer the math question because we’ve done the same kind of
questions many times.

Although it took me lots of time _____ a big meal for ten people, I was happy that everyone
enjoyed it.

Don’t let the children swim in the river. We don’t know how _____ it is. It could be
dangerous.

Bob is _____ of the boys in the family. He never does any housework. His brothers at least
take out the garbage sometimes.
Aunt Gina has lived in this town for more than sixty years, so she _____ it very well.

We won’t see the sun even after the typhoon leaves, because the news said that heavier rain
will soon _____.

Yesterday when I got home from work, my brother _____ for dinner, so he invited me to join
him.
You were _____ not to lend Amy money. She never gives back what she borrows.

Have you found a summer job yet? Mr. Firth _____ someone to take care of his kids during
the vacation. Maybe you can talk to him.
David looked out of the balcony window and saw a woman get in his car _____ away.

The police haven’t found the little girl who _____ at a supermarket. They’ll keep doing all
they can to find her.

Buses to the airport only come once every hour, and we just missed _____. Why don’t we
take a taxi?
Ariel _____ every night for a week before her Chinese test and got a very good grade.
Listen! The baby _____ in the bedroom. Why don’t you go in and take a look?

Jill is _____ that the city park is closed for the music festival because now she can’t jog
there.
Steven wants to be a _____, because he loves to watch people enjoy the food he prepares.
Paul misses his parents a lot. He _____ them since he came to work in Taiwan a year ago.

Our teacher Ms. Wu seldom laughs, but when she _____, everyone in the same building can
hear her.
My sister is coming to my home today. She _____ with me for a week.

Edward had worked as a computer engineer for ten years. This _____ helped him a lot when
he started his own computer shop.

If you’re interested in our business plan, this number and ask for Ms. Lee. She’ll answer your
questions.

Jimmy would not get up for breakfast, _____ his dad had already tried to pull him from his
bed several times.

Duncan spent all his money trying to _____ the bookstore his mom left him. Sadly, the
business never got better, and he had to close it in the end.
Fiona loves listening to her children sing songs _____ at school.

Beverly eats lots of snacks _____ meals. That’s why she is often too full to eat anything at
mealtimes.
My mom puts the _____ on to keep her hands away from water when she washes the dishes.
Can you _____ your feet a little off the floor? I want to see if my keys are under the sofa.
_____ of my sisters are older than I am. I’m the youngest of the three children in my family.

The beach near our town is a very _____ place. Every summer at least one kid dies there in
the water.

My wife enjoys going to the movies with her friends, but I like to watch TV at home by
_____.

For the past twenty years, my father _____ in a school library. But he’ll leave the job next
month.

It’s great that we can buy train tickets over the phone without going out. It _____ us a lot of
time.
Mozart _____ his first music when he was only six years old.

Jill: Have you decided _____ you will celebrate your 30th birthday?
Sue: Yeah, I’m going to have a big barbecue party.
Alison doesn’t like _____ what to do. She only does things she wants to do.
Josh has planned to make a trip to New York and _____ some of his friends there.

Ms. Johnson has been taking phone calls since she entered the office this morning.
Just when she thought she could finally leave work, _____ call came in.

We were so sure that Jerry _____ well on the difficult job. His past experience in other work
showed he was the right guy for it. So when he failed, no one believed it.

For Mike, the price is _____ important thing when he shops for jeans. He cares even more
about the shape and the size of the pockets.
Ms. Liu usually gives us a lot of homework, _____ she didn’t give us any today.
Playing games on the cellphone _____ popular with high school students.
There _____ more than twenty clubs in our school. Which one would you like to join?
Diane had a bad cold last week. She is still too _____ to go mountain climbing with you.
The book under Mary’s desk is _____, but I don’t know why it is there.

Last night a garbage truck hit a tree and turned over. Now the street is _____ with lots of
garbage.

It almost killed Kevin to take care of his baby sister for one afternoon. He wondered how his
mom could do _____ every day.
Joyce tells her brother everything. She never _____ anything from him.
Ben always uses his birthday as a(n) _____ to ask Dad to buy him something expensive.
_____that last piece of pie? If not, can I have it? I didn’t eat much this morning.
Everyone in the class enjoys playing chess _____ Bill; he thinks the game is boring.

In my school days, I to English radio programs every day. That was how I learned English at
that time.

Tom’s voice _____ when he talks about his neighbors. He speaks faster, his face becomes
redder and you can almost see fire in his eyes.

_____ other waiters in the restaurant have worked here longer than Clark; only Lois and Lana
started working here before him.
The _____ is so strong today that my hair keeps blowing in the air.
When the baby cried, Mr. Wu _____ in the kitchen and did not hear it.
I don’t have any money with me because I _____ my wallet this morning.
You need not only good luck but also hard work to become a _____ baseball player.

The woman who lives next door to Ken is a _____ to him. They have never met and he
doesn’t even know her name.

With the new bus line, it is much more for Fanny to go to school. It saves her a lot of time
now.

Dad: Have you brushed your teeth yet?
Ann: No, but I _____ before I go to bed.

Alice: Do you know _____ Grandma is going to visit us?
Willy: It’s next week. She told me on the phone. And we’ll take her to the national park.
It took the police lots of time _____ who entered Liu’s house and killed her one year ago.

Many famous people visit this restaurant. Popular singers like A-mei and Jay Chou _____
here with their friends.

The factory has been throwing trash into the river for years. Now _____ must be taken to
stop this.

The beach party tonight _____ the end of our summer vacation. Tomorrow we are all going
back home and getting ready for school.

Anyone who reads Loren’s business plan will quickly see some serious problems in it, or
_____ feel something is not right.

I’ve wanted to read The Diary of a Young Girl for months, today I finally borrowed the book
from the library.
My sister wants to buy a car _____ she doesn’t have enough money.
Jim always forgets my birthday. He has asked me many times and still can’t _____ it.
The little girl was _____ by a truck on her way home and was badly hurt.
Excuse me. I really need to go now. My kids _____ for me at school.

Amy’s father is very sick. The doctors can do nothing for him, so Amy went to the temple to
_____ for him.

I’m glad that my school has students wear . I don’t have to worry about what clothes to wear
to school.

We are surprised that Sally and Ray decided to get married. No one knows _____.
They often fight with each other and are unhappy together.

I don’t think Katie will read any one of the books you’ve picked out for her: _____ look(s)
very boring.
Jenny’s bag is very heavy because _____ filled with toy cars.
_____ a map with you when you go to a place for the first time.
The weather _____ rainy and cloudy in the last few days. I hope the sun will come out soon.
All the excuses Nick made _____ a lot about how much he hates to do the job.

Sabine walks so _____ in the apartment that sometimes you don’t even know she’s just
passed by. You wonder if her feet ever touch the floor.

In the past, people thought it was a _____ idea to send e-mails and read news online, but now
it is part of our everyday life.

Chris: Which _____ looks better on me?
Penny: I think purple’s better. You look great in purple.
My cat got excited when it saw the boy _____ the birds.
Mr. Jackson is a very _____ writer; people of all ages enjoy his stories.
Carol sounded happy when we talked on the phone; I could feel joy in her _____.
Mark studies very hard and never _____ classes. He goes to school even when he is sick.
Have you got anything for Joe _____? He’d be happy to get your gift on his birthday.
Susan bought _____ bread in the supermarket, but she did not buy anything to drink.
Playing sports at least three times a week _____ good for your health.
My parents have different hobbies. One enjoys baking; _____ enjoys taking pictures.

My mom told me to take care of _____ in England. She worried that I couldn’t eat or sleep
well there.

The paint on the wall is not as _____ as it was ten years ago. It has changed from white to
gray.

I told you this road went the wrong way, but you just wouldn’t listen. Now we have to _____
and take another road.

The last five years have not been to ____ Jennie. Her face is covered with lines and she looks
much older than she is.

My dog Jimmy loves _____ with a comb. Every time I comb his hair, he will close his eyes
and fall asleep.
This dress is pretty, _____ it does not look good on me.
Getting up early on a cold morning is not easy, _____?
Tonight I’ll stay at the office until I _____ the work.
Charles _____ a day in the department store looking for a hat for his wife.
Tom _____ ten pounds over the past two months. He looks much thinner now.
I don’t like any one of these three watches. Can you show me _____ one?

The waiters are asked to be _____; they should always smile and remember to say
“Welcome” and “Please.”

On Children’s Day, Ms. Lee, a famous storybook writer, _____ to Molly’s Bookstore to talk
about her new book. My two little kids just can’t wait to see her.

No one thought James would appear at Katie’s party. So when he _____, everyone was
surprised and could not believe their eyes.

B&J Café known as the tallest building in town. However, O&G Restaurant became the
tallest building in 2010.

Actor David Piper became tired of talking about the movie _____ after he was interviewed
about it many times.
